title: APEX Connect 2026: Conference Focused on AI and APEXlang
summary: The annual APEX Connect conference takes place May 18–20 at Heide Park Soltau, Germany. The keynote — "Low-code with APEX 2026 — The State of Play" — covers APEX combined with AI, the new APEXlang language, enhancements for Interactive Reports, Map Regions, Dynamic Actions, REST integration, and PL/SQL APIs.

title: Oracle APEX AI Day: Events Across 10 Countries with APEX 26.1 Preview
summary: Oracle is running a series of APEX AI Day events across 10 countries — the next one on March 26 in Colombo, Sri Lanka. Attendees get early access to APEX 26.1 capabilities: AI tools, natural-language Interactive Reports, the new Universal Theme, and hands-on labs led by the Oracle APEX development team.

title: APEXlang: Text-Based Format for Building APEX Applications
summary: Oracle introduced APEXlang — an open application specification in YAML/JSON format (.apx files). Entire apps are described as text: pages, regions, buttons, SQL queries. Sync with the database via a built-in compiler; SQLcl and SQL Developer support included. This enables true file-based workflows and AI-driven UI generation through natural language prompts.

title: Oracle APEX 26.1: AI-Centric Release and New Universal Theme
summary: The next Oracle APEX version — branded 26.1 — is shaping up as a landmark release. Key highlights: APEXlang for code-based app definitions, AI in Interactive Reports (natural-language filters and charts), built-in QA live checks, and an updated Universal Theme with new mobile capabilities.
